nasb.text: Also the priest who presents any man’s burnt offering, that priest shall have for himself the skin of the burnt offering which he has presented.

esv.text: And the priest who offers any man’s burnt offering shall have for himself the skin of the burnt offering that he has offered.

cnv.text: 祭司替人獻燔祭，祭牲的皮要歸獻燔祭的祭司。

ccb.text: 燔祭牲的皮要归主持祭礼的祭司。
